# Sample post body

This post is used by `lib/blog.ts` unit tests. It contains enough words to test the reading-time calculator — `200 words per minute` is the threshold. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
